create_vm: What would you like to name this VM?
What operating system type will this VM run?
clone_vm: Which existing VM would you like to clone?
What should the cloned VM be named?
launch_vm: Which VM would you like to launch?
stop_vm: Which VM would you like to stop? (or 'all' to stop every VM)
delete_vm: Which VM would you like to delete?
vm_status: Which VM's status would you like to check?
monitor_vm: Which VM would you like to monitor? (or 'all' for all VMs)
get_vm_logs: Which VM's logs would you like to read?
show_config: Which VM's config would you like to see?
update_config: Which VM's config would you like to update?
print_command: Which VM's QEMU command would you like to print?
resize_disk: Which VM's disk would you like to resize?
What size (in GB) should the disk be resized to?
snapshot_create: Which VM would you like to snapshot?
What should this snapshot be named?
snapshot_list: Which VM's snapshots would you like to list?
snapshot_restore: Which VM would you like to restore a snapshot on?
Which snapshot would you like to restore?
snapshot_delete: Which VM's snapshot would you like to delete?
Which snapshot would you like to delete?
set_resource_limits: Which VM would you like to set resource limits on?
open_display: Which VM's display would you like to open?
open_shell: Which VM's serial console would you like to open?
send_monitor_cmd: Which VM would you like to send a monitor command to?
What QEMU monitor command would you like to send?
check_profile_compatibility: Which hardware profile would you like to check compatibility for?
create_profile: What would you like to name this hardware profile?
Please provide a short description for this profile.
delete_profile: Which hardware profile would you like to delete?
create_network: What would you like to name this isolated network?
delete_network: Which network would you like to delete?
add_vm_to_network: Which network would you like to add the VM to?
Which VM would you like to add to the network?
